column4: Pre-configured monitoring of 475+ gaming jurisdiction sources. Team can add/remove sources. Organised by region > country > jurisdiction > regulatory body.
column5: Replaces manual checking of hundreds of regulatory websites daily

column4: Crawls all configured sources at defined intervals. Detects additions, amendments, repeals. Redlined diff view showing exactly what changed between versions.
column5: Instant visibility into changes without reading full documents

column4: Each change auto-scored for relevance to GLI's certification scope. Auto-tagged by jurisdiction, game type, regulatory topic. Alerts routed to right team.
column5: Ensures only relevant alerts reach the right desk

column4: Every version of every monitored document stored with timestamps. Full history accessible for any jurisdiction. Exportable as evidence for certification audits.
column5: Critical for maintaining credibility as a certification body

column4: Tracks proposed bills, draft regulations, consultation papers before they become law. Sends early-warning alerts so testing teams can prepare in advance.
column5: Proactive preparation before a new regulation takes effect

column4: AI auto-summarises any regulatory document in plain English. Highlights what changed, what it means, and what action is required. Available in multiple languages.
column5: Faster interpretation across multilingual global teams

column4: Chat interface trained on GLI's entire monitored regulatory library. Staff ask plain-language questions and get answers with citations. Scoped to curated document set only.
column5: Replaces hours of manual research with instant accurate answers

column4: Side-by-side comparison of regulations across multiple jurisdictions on one screen. Example: Compare responsible gaming requirements across UK, Malta, and New Jersey. Exportable as tables.
column5: Accelerates advisory work across multiple markets

column4: Compares a gaming product's current certification against new/updated regulations. Flags gaps where recertification may be needed. Generates gap report with recommended actions.
column5: Directly supports GLI's core certification business

column4: Monitors regulatory enforcement actions, fines, and sanctions issued globally. Provides trend analysis showing which jurisdictions are increasing enforcement activity.
